description:
Black to kill.
(This is a tricky problem so if I missed any variations please let me know.
sgf: (;FF[4]GM[1]CA[UTF-8]AP[goproblems:0.1.0]SZ[19]ST[0]AB[bd][bj][bk][cc][cg][ci][ck][dd][dg][dh][dj][ed][ef][fd]AW[be][bg][bh][bi][cd][cf][ch][de][df](;B[ac];W[af];B[ae];W[ad];B[ce]LB[ae:A]LB[cd:B]C[This is a double ko at A and B which means white is dead. If white loses either ko the eye at B14 will be falsified. If white fills at A, black fill at B and falsify the eye. If white tries to fight the ko at B, black will always have a ko threat at A. RIGHT])(;B[ce];W[ei];B[di];W[cd]C[Right back where we started. You can do better than just fighting this as a direct ko. ](;B[ac];W[af];B[ae];W[ad];B[ce]LB[ae:A]LB[cd:B]C[This is a double ko at A and B which means white is dead. If white loses either ko the eye at B14 will be falsified. If white fills at A, black fill at B and falsify the eye. If white tries to fight the ko at B, black will always have a ko threat at A. RIGHT])(;B[ae];W[bc];B[ce]C[Still a direct ko.]))(;B[ae];W[bc];B[ce]C[This is a direct ko to kill. Black can do better. Especially considering the local ko threat at E11.])(;B[af];W[bc]))
